eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Hamilton, TN; at 05:19 PM ON MAY 4, 2026 Effective until 06:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Missing elderly male from the Red Bank TN area / Billy Doss / blue shirt with orange trim / should be on foot with a walking stick / please call 911 if located Please call 911 if located or if you have seen this man in the area you are located in
